compressed_timeline.description: Program completed in suspiciously short time relative to typical duration
compressed_timeline.notes: Flag if program completed in less than 50% of typical duration

excessive_transfer_credits.description: Unusually high proportion of credits transferred from other institutions
excessive_transfer_credits.notes: Flag if >75% of total credits are transfers

inconsistent_enrollment.description: Unexplained gaps, overlaps, or out-of-sequence coursework
inconsistent_enrollment.notes: Look for courses taken out of prerequisite order or simultaneous enrollment at multiple institutions

gpa_discrepancy.description: Reported GPA does not match calculated GPA from individual course grades
gpa_discrepancy.notes: Allow 0.3 tolerance for rounding and transfer credit effects

duplicate_courses.description: Same course appears multiple times without clear retake justification
duplicate_courses.notes: Some retakes are legitimate (grade replacement); flag only suspicious patterns

unrecognized_institution.description: Issuing institution is not in the approved list of Mississippi nursing schools
unrecognized_institution.notes: May be legitimate out-of-state school for endorsement applicants - requires manual review

missing_graduation_confirmation.description: No degree conferral, graduation date, or completion statement on transcript
missing_graduation_confirmation.notes: All transcripts should explicitly confirm program completion

in_progress_courses.description: Transcript shows courses still in progress at time of application
in_progress_courses.notes: Applicant may not have fully completed their program

known_fraud_patterns: Transcripts from institutions under federal investigation (e.g., Operation Nightingale schools)
Identical transcripts submitted by multiple applicants
Transcripts showing clinical hours at facilities that do not exist
Program completion certificates without corresponding transcript coursework
Transcripts with formatting inconsistencies suggesting document alteration
